mapper.select: SELECT id, main_menu, sub_menu, title, user_id, user_name, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_owner, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, is_notice, create_date, modified_date FROM `post` WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `post` WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, main_menu, sub_menu, title, user_id, user_name, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_owner, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, is_notice, create_date, modified_date FROM `post` WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND is_deleted = 0
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id, main_menu, sub_menu, title, user_id, user_name, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_owner, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, is_notice, create_date, modified_date FROM `post`
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
id title counsel_type create_date
ASC DESC
mapper.select: SELECT id, main_menu, sub_menu, title, content, user_id, user_name, FALSE AS is_owner, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, is_notice, create_date, modified_date FROM `post` WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_date DESC

SELECT id, main_menu, sub_menu, title, content, user_id, user_name, FALSE AS is_owner, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, is_notice, create_date, modified_date FROM `post` WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND is_deleted = 0 AND id = #{postId}

SELECT id, main_menu, sub_menu, title, content, user_id, user_name, TRUE AS is_owner, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, is_notice, create_date, modified_date FROM `post` WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND is_deleted = 0 AND id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `post` (main_menu, sub_menu, visibility_level, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, is_notice, is_deleted, create_date, modified_date) VALUES ('board', 'counseling', COALESCE(#{visibilityLevel}, 'public'), #{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{counselType}, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `post` SET comment_count = #{commentCount}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE `post` SET visibility_level = COALESCE(#{visibilityLevel}, 'public'), modified_date = NOW() WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE `post` SET is_deleted = 1, modified_date = NOW() WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND id = #{postId}

UPDATE `post` SET title = #{params.title}, content = #{params.content}, phone = #{params.phone}, email = #{params.email}, counsel_type = #{params.counselType}, visibility_level = #{params.visibilityLevel}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE main_menu = 'board' AND sub_menu = 'counseling' AND id = #{id}
